title: Native Nanobleach of native nanodiscs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"er789","text":"This is a protocol to conduct Native Nanobleach of native nanodiscs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Note, this method is adapted from Walker, Brown, et al. (DOI: 10.1038/s41565-023-01547-4 )
Prepare flow chamber by treating with poly-L-lysine (PLL) PEG and PEG-biotin.
Add biotinylated GFP-nanobody to flow chamber.
Add native nanodiscs to the flow chamber for immobilization.
Conduct step-photobleaching analysis using TIRF microscopy.
creator: Caroline Brown
